sampling_results.notes: Sampled 20K part rows (1%), 600K lineitem rows (1%). All PK-FK joins (supplier, orders, partsupp) are 100% hit rate.

join_order.build: nation(25 rows) → flat char[25][26] name array indexed by n_nationkey
join_order.probe: supplier(100K rows via scan) → flat int32_t[100001] suppkey_to_nationkey array
join_order.note: Both tiny; sequential scan, O(1) lookup. Zero hash table needed.

join_order.build: part(2M rows, filter p_name LIKE '%green%') → bitset[2M+1] green_parts keyed by p_partkey
join_order.probe: lineitem(60M rows) via l_partkey membership test in bitset
join_order.note: Bitset = 256KB, fits entirely in L2/L3. ~5.75% pass → ~3.45M qualifying lineitem rows.

join_order.probe: qualifying lineitem rows via composite key (l_partkey<<32)|l_suppkey → ps_row → ps_supplycost
join_order.note: 100% hit rate confirmed by sampling. Point lookup into mmap'd 256MB hash table.

join_order.probe: qualifying lineitem rows via l_orderkey → o_row → o_orderdate → year
join_order.note: PK-FK, 100% hit rate. Year extracted via Howard Hinnant closed-form formula.

logical_plan.aggregation_note: 25 nations × 7 years = 175 groups max. Use flat double[25][7] array indexed by (nation_idx, year-1992). Thread-local copies merged after parallel phase. No hash table needed.

filter_pushdown.action: Apply during part scan; collect p_partkey into bitset. Apply BEFORE lineitem scan.
First filter in lineitem scan loop. Skip ~94.25% of rows early.

data_structures.nation_name_array: flat char[25][26] — direct array indexed by n_nationkey (0-based). 650 bytes total, trivially in registers/L1.
data_structures.suppkey_to_nationkey: flat int32_t[100001] — direct array indexed by s_suppkey (1-based). 400KB, fits in L2. O(1) lookup, no hash needed.
data_structures.green_parts_bitset: bitset of size 2,000,001 bits (~256KB) indexed by p_partkey value. Set bit for each qualifying part. L3-resident. O(1) membership test via bit shift+mask.
data_structures.partsupp_join: mmap indexes/partsupp_composite_hash.bin — pre-built composite hash. Key=(int64_t)(l_partkey<<32)|l_suppkey. Zero build cost. Layout: [uint32_t num_pos][uint32_t positions[8M]][uint32_t cap=16777216][HEntry64 × 16777216].
data_structures.orders_join: mmap indexes/orders_orderkey_hash.bin — pre-built single-key hash on o_orderkey. Zero build cost. Layout: [uint32_t num_pos=15M][positions[15M]][uint32_t cap=33554432][HEntry32 × 33554432].
data_structures.aggregation: thread_local double[25][7] flat arrays (175 doubles = 1.4KB per thread). Indexed as [nation_idx][year-1992]. 64 threads × 1.4KB = 89.6KB total. Merge sequentially after parallel phase.

parallelism.note: 64 threads scan lineitem in 65K-row morsels. Each thread: filter l_partkey via bitset, lookup partsupp+orders via mmap indices, accumulate into thread-local double[25][7].

index_usage.purpose: Zero-cost lookup of ps_supplycost for each qualifying (l_partkey,l_suppkey) pair. Avoids building 8M-row hash table at runtime.
index_usage.access_pattern: random point lookup on ~3.45M qualifying lineitem rows

index_usage.purpose: Zero-cost lookup of o_orderdate for year extraction. Avoids building 15M-row hash table at runtime.
index_usage.access_pattern: random point lookup on ~3.45M qualifying lineitem rows

scan_details.part_scan: Sequential single-pass. Load p_name (56B) and p_partkey (4B) per row. Apply strstr for '%green%', set bitset bit. 2M rows × 60B = 120MB read.
scan_details.supplier_scan: Sequential single-pass. Load s_suppkey + s_nationkey. Populate suppkey_to_nationkey[suppkey]=nationkey. 100K rows × 8B = 800KB read.
scan_details.lineitem_scan: Parallel morsel-driven. Per row: load l_partkey(4B), check bitset. If pass: load l_suppkey(4B), l_orderkey(4B), l_extendedprice(8B), l_discount(8B), l_quantity(8B). Then lookup partsupp+orders indices, compute amount, accumulate. Total ~5 columns = ~1.7GB.

physical_plan.year_extraction: Howard Hinnant civil_from_days closed-form: z=d+719468; era=(z>=0?z:z-146096)/146097; doe=z-era*146097; yoe=(doe-doe/1460+doe/36524-doe/146096)/365; year=yoe+era*400; no loops needed.
physical_plan.amount_computation: l_extendedprice*(1.0-l_discount) - ps_supplycost*l_quantity. All doubles. Computed inline during lineitem scan.
physical_plan.final_sort: Sort 175-element result array by (nation_name ASC, year DESC). std::sort on 175 elements — negligible cost.
physical_plan.memory_pattern: streaming_sequential for scans (part, supplier, lineitem). random_access_with_prefetch for mmap index lookups (partsupp, orders). Green parts bitset is hot in L3 (~256KB).

phase_breakdown.lineitem_parallel_scan: ~60ms (1.7GB across 5 columns, 64 threads, memory bandwidth ~50GB/s → ~34ms + overhead)
phase_breakdown.partsupp_orders_random_lookups: ~80ms (3.45M × 2 random mmap accesses; indexes likely warm in LLC after first pass)
